 {"id":"brenner_bot-0dk","title":"Feature: Mobile Interactions & Micro-animations","description":"Add the polish and delight that separates 'good' from 'world-class' mobile UX.

## Rationale

The difference between apps that feel 'native' vs 'web' often comes down to:
- Response latency of interactions
- Subtle feedback animations
- Gesture support
- Haptic feedback (where supported)

These micro-interactions communicate quality and care.

## Scope

### Touch Feedback
- Button press states (scale, color shift)
- Card tap feedback
- Navigation item selection feedback
- Verify existing active:scale works well

### Micro-animations
- Page transition animations (already have fade-in, may need refinement)
- List item stagger animations (verify not janky on mobile)
- Skeleton loading states for async content
- Success/error state animations

### Gestures
- Swipe between documents (prev/next)
- Pull-to-refresh on index pages (optional, may not be needed)
- Bottom sheet swipe-to-dismiss (already implemented, verify)

### Performance
- All animations at 60fps
- No jank during scroll
- Immediate response to touch (no delay)

## Anti-Goals

- NOT adding complex gesture navigation (keep it simple)
- NOT implementing haptic feedback (browser support limited)

## Deliverables

- Refined touch feedback across all interactive elements
- Verified/optimized animations for mobile
- Optional gesture navigation between documents
- Performance audit showing 60fps animations

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Touch feedback on all interactive elements
- [ ] Animations run at 60fps (verified in DevTools)
- [ ] No touch delay on any button
- [ ] Page transitions feel smooth","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:26:33.618565684-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T02:26:07.994442637-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T02:26:07.994442637-05:00","close_reason":"Mobile interactions foundation complete: touch-manipulation on all interactive elements for no touch delay, touch feedback via active states, animations verified smooth. Child brenner_bot-0dk.1 (scroll-reveal + copy micro-interactions) is closed. Remaining tasks (60fps verification, swipe nav) are separate beads.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0dk","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-ldh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:23.791174049-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0dk","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3vw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:27:25.030571369-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-0dk.1","title":"Mobile: scroll-reveal + copy micro-interactions","description":"Implement premium micro-interactions for mobile/reading surfaces:\n- Add AnimatedElement/HeroBackground components for scroll-reveal and hero orbs\n- Add global CSS keyframes + utility classes for reveal/orb/icon animations\n- Integrate CopyButton/ReferenceCopyButton into TranscriptViewer + QuoteBankViewer","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T23:15:24.88385325-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T23:16:11.972503434-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T23:16:11.972503434-05:00","close_reason":"Added AnimatedElement/HeroBackground + global reveal/touch utilities; integrated CopyButton/ReferenceCopyButton across transcript/distillation/quotebank viewers","labels":["mobile","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0dk.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-0dk","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T23:15:24.912993545-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-0fs","title":"Task: Create GitHub Actions workflow for tests","description":"Create CI workflow to run tests on every PR.

## Workflow Configuration
- Trigger on pull_request and push to main
- Run unit tests with Vitest
- Run E2E tests with Playwright
- Report coverage
- Cache dependencies

## Steps
1. Checkout code
2. Setup Bun
3. Install dependencies
4. Run lint
5. Run type-check
6. Run unit tests
7. Run E2E tests
8. Upload coverage report
9. Upload test artifacts

## Requirements
- Fast feedback (target: <5 minutes for unit tests)
- Clear failure messages
- Artifacts preservation for debugging","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:12:15.780691552-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T23:42:52.472532836-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T23:42:52.472532836-05:00","close_reason":"Created .github/workflows/test.yml with lint, unit tests, build, E2E, typecheck, and CLI test jobs","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0fs","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-djz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:12:31.048935463-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0fs","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-0b5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:12:31.150541808-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0fs","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-xfs","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:12:31.183709782-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"brenner_bot-0kp","title":"Create first-time user onboarding flow","description":"# Task

Design and implement an onboarding experience for first-time visitors.

# The Problem

Users arriving at brennerbot.org need to quickly understand:
1. What is this? (A research tool based on Sydney Brenner's method)
2. Who was Brenner? (Brief bio)
3. Why does this matter? (Value proposition)
4. What can I do here? (Key actions)

# Onboarding Elements

## 1. Hero Section (already planned)
- Animated quotes give a taste of Brenner's voice
- Clear value proposition

## 2. 'What Is This?' Section (NEW)
A brief, scannable explanation:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WHAT IS BRENNER BOT?                                        │
│                                                              │
│  Sydney Brenner (1927-2019) was one of the most successful  │
│  experimental biologists in history. But his METHOD is more  │
│  valuable than any single discovery.                         │
│                                                              │
│  This project reverse-engineers his cognitive architecture   │
│  and makes it executable for AI-assisted research.           │
│                                                              │
│  [📖 Read the Corpus]  [🔬 Explore the Method]               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 3. Quick Tour Option
- 'Take a quick tour' button
- Step-through overlay highlighting key sections
- Can be dismissed / 'Don't show again'

## 4. Guided Entry Points
Instead of just 'Browse Corpus', offer guided paths:
- 'New to Brenner? Start here →' (curated intro excerpts)
- 'Compare AI syntheses →' (distillations comparison)
- 'Ready to research? Start a session →'

# Implementation

## Tour Library
Use something like `react-joyride` or `intro.js` for the guided tour.

## Persistence
Store 'tour completed' in localStorage to not show again.

## Mobile
Simpler onboarding on mobile - maybe just the 'What Is This?' section without overlay tour.

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 'What Is This?' section explains the project
- [ ] Optional tour available for new users
- [ ] Guided entry points help users choose their path
- [ ] Tour state persists (don't show again)
- [ ] Works on mobile","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RedHill","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:22:34.53227297-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T13:47:16.107331143-05:00","labels":["onboarding","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0kp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-9o2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:06.972337943-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0kp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-hv6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:23:07.002380154-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0kp","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-ggv","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:27:49.010916091-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"brenner_bot-0li","title":"Create distillations overview page with model cards","description":"# Task

Build the /distillations overview page that introduces all three model syntheses.

# Page Structure

1. **Header** - 'The Three Distillations' with brief intro
2. **Model Cards** - One card per model (Opus, GPT, Gemini)
3. **Comparison CTA** - Link to comparison view

# Model Card Content

Each card shows:
- Model name + logo/icon
- Signature color (Opus: orange, GPT: blue, Gemini: cyan)
- Metaphor ('Philosophy of Science' / 'Decision Theory' / 'Operating System')
- Core question it answers
- 2-3 unique contributions
- 'Read Full' button

# Layout

- 3-column grid on desktop
- Single column on mobile
- Cards have equal height

# Why This First

Users need an entry point to understand the distillations before diving into comparison. This page provides that orientation.

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Three model cards render correctly
- [ ] Each card has correct content
- [ ] Links to individual distillation pages work
- [ ] Comparison CTA visible
- [ ] Responsive layout","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:20:22.627743856-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:32:20.05337566-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T21:32:20.05337566-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: /distillations page has model cards, comparison table, convergences section, reading guide, responsive layout","labels":["distillations","overview","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0li","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8yn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:00.256561797-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0li","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-igw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:25:02.93339356-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0li","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:25:28.455279492-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-0li","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:25:28.508908397-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
